n: Roaring Maw in the Haunted Burrow

steps.t: Somewhere in an evil-feeling part of the Haunted Burrow, an odious roar made it clear that a bear had taken up residence in the hobbit-hole, in the Co…
Polo Puddifoot awaits you outside the Haunted Burrow. You should return to Polo Puddifoot and tell him of this bear you encountered.
